name: camellia-plugins
description: Personal plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: sdd-kit
plugins.description: PRD-first SDD workflow: brainstorm writes package PRD with technical framing, impl executes PRD scope, review audits. Supports ordered child package materialization, deterministic .arbor package state, and .wiki orientation notes. Skills: research / brainstorm / impl / review / wiki. Skill-first, no fixed agents; user controls transitions.
